units.source_text: 實。透過資⾦來源、期限、貨幣和地區的均衡組合達致多元，從⽽務求

units.source_text: 結構性匯兌風險承擔指集團在附屬公司、分⾏、合營安排或聯營公司，以及任何相關對沖項⽬（該等實體以美元以外貨幣作為功能貨幣）之淨資產
units.translation_target_text: Structural exchange risk exposure refers to the Group's net assets in subsidiaries, branches, joint arrangements or associates, and any related hedging items (such entities have currencies other than the US dollar as their functional currency)

units.source_text: 或資本投資。結構性風險承擔的匯兌差額通常於「其他全⾯收益」內確認。
units.translation_target_text: or capital investment. Exchange differences on structural exposures are generally recognized within “other comprehensive income”.
